evidences.content: In this lesson 在这节课中 let's talk about character animation and how we can combine Mixamo animations together to create our own fight scenes 让我们谈谈角色动画以及如何将Mixamo动画组合在一起，创造我们自己的战斗场景 We're going to start off by importing our character and importing the animations just to walk through the process and refresh your memory 我们将从导入角色和导入动画开始，只是为了走一遍流程并刷新您的记忆 But the real focus is on stringing animations together inside of Sequencer to create our own fight choreography 但真正的重点是在Sequencer中将动画串联起来，创造我们自己的战斗编舞 Here we are on Mixamocom 我们现在在Mixamo网站上 I just used this Vanguard character by T 我刚刚使用了这个T公司的先锋角色 So all you have to do is click on it and press use this character 所以你只需要点击它并按使用该角色 And then we're going to go to the animations tab at the top of Mixamocom 然后我们要去Mixamo网站顶部的动画选项卡 And on this first page 在这个第一页上 just scroll down until you see this sword and shield pack 只需向下滚动，直到看到这个剑盾套装 If I click on this 如果我点击这个 we'll start to preview all of the animations applied onto our Vanguard character 我们将开始预览应用在先锋角色上的所有动画 So when you're seeing this 所以当你看到这个 try to think of some original ideas and scenes you could create with some of these animations 试着想一些你可以用这些动画创作的原创想法和场景 Then all you have to do is press download 然后你只需要按下载 switch the frames to second over to 24 and press download 将帧率切换到24并按下载 Now that we're back in Unreal 现在我们回到Unreal let's double click on the Saber Battle folder 让我们双击Saber Battle文件夹 we've already imported the Mixamo character and animations into the project file under Saber Battle and the Vanguard folder 我们已经将Mixamo角色和动画导入到了Saber Battle和Vanguard文件夹下的项目文件中 And here we can find the skeletal meshes for our white and tan looking Vanguard warriors 在这里，我们可以找到我们的白色和棕色外观的先锋战士的骨骼网格 And we have all of the animations imported in the animation folder 我们将所有动画都导入到了动画文件夹中 But as a reminder 但是作为提醒 to do this from scratch 从头开始做这个 all you need to do is just import our character first and foremost 你只需要首先导入我们的角色 So there should be an object called Vanguard 所以应该有一个名为"Vanguard"的对象 the name of the character 角色的名字 And then this is the FBX import box 然后这是FBX导入框 And the important things to note here are the difference between a skeletal mesh and a skeleton 这里需要注意的重要事项是骨骼网格和骨架之间的区别 So a skeletal mesh is the mesh associated to the character 所以骨骼网格是与角色相关联的网格 The skeleton is the actual bones and the rig underneath that your animations are linked to 骨架是实际的骨骼和你的动画所链接到的骨架下面的绑定 So in this case 所以在这种情况下 we need to create a brand new skeletal mesh and a brand new skeleton because it's a new character 我们需要创建一个全新的骨骼网格和一个全新的骨架，因为这是一个新角色 So to import a new character 所以要导入一个新角色 make sure skeletal mesh is checked to true and leave the skeleton blank 确保骨骼网格被选中为true，并保持骨架为空白 And we'll hit import 然后我们点击导入 And once this is imported 一旦导入完成 we should have our character 我们应该有我们的角色 So we have our skeletal mesh 所以我们有了我们的骨骼网格 we have our skeleton 我们有了我们的骨架 So just to keep this organized 所以为了保持整齐 I'm going to take all these textures and the materials and put them in another folder 我将把所有这些纹理和材质放到另一个文件夹中 And then we'll create a new folder called animations 然后我们将创建一个名为animations的新文件夹 And now we need to start importing our animations 现在我们需要开始导入我们的动画 So now let's just select everything and drag this in and import it 所以现在让我们选择所有内容并拖放进来进行导入 And then now we'll just need to assign our skeleton 然后现在我们只需要分配我们的骨架 So we'll type in Vanguard and we have our Vanguard skeleton 所以我们输入Vanguard，我们有了我们的Vanguard骨架 And now we'll just set the animation length to exported time and press import 现在我们只需要将动画长度设置为导出时间，然后按导入 now that the animations are imported 现在动画已经导入 we can open up any of these and we'll have our animation editor here 我们可以打开其中任何一个，我们将在这里有我们的动画编辑器 Just so you know 只是让你知道 you don't really modify any animations here in terms of the actual keyframes 实际上你不会在这里修改任何动画的关键帧 although it is possible to do like mini changes 尽管可以进行一些微小的更改 but here we can preview all of our different animations 但在这里，我们可以预览我们的所有不同动画 Now let's add some animation to our hero character here 现在让我们给我们的英雄角色添加一些动画 So I've actually just opened up our previous level sequence here 所以我实际上只是在这里打开了我们之前的关卡序列 Vanguard Clash Final 先锋冲突最终版 so we can take a look 这样我们可以看看 And if you're ever wondering exactly what went in 如果你想知道到底发生了什么 you can just hover over any of these animations 你可以将鼠标悬停在任何一个动画上 right click on them 右键点击它们 and we can actually just open up the animation for any of these clips 我们实际上可以打开任何一个剪辑的动画 And I can't stress this enough 我再次强调一下 definitely make sure to open up all these animations in your animation browser and just start clicking through any of these 确保在动画浏览器中打开所有这些动画，然后开始点击其中任何一个 We have some force motions 我们有一些力量动作 We have some crouch and we have some interesting death animations 我们有一些蹲下和一些有趣的死亡动画 So you could actually add in several of these warriors into this one scene and just keep reusing these different animations 所以你实际上可以将几个这些战士添加到这个场景中，并不断重复使用这些不同的动画 And the only limit here is your creativity 这里唯一的限制就是你的创造力 So let's take a look at creating this original animation step by step 让我们逐步看看如何创建这个原创动画 Now to make sure that we're starting from the same exact spot and position in the search bar 现在，为了确保我们从搜索栏的相同位置开始 just type in start 只需输入start Just open up this ML Vanguard Clash Start Here level 只需打开这个ML Vanguard Clash Start Here关卡 and then we'll want to open up Sequencer 然后我们要打开Sequencer So click on LS Vanguard Clash Tutorial Start 所以点击LS Vanguard Clash Tutorial Start Now in this sequence 现在在这个序列中 we've already added in our main characters 我们已经添加了我们的主要角色 but if you wanted to do this from scratch 但如果你想从头开始做这个 it's really easy 这真的很简单 We have two ways to do that 我们有两种方法可以做到这一点 We just want to take our Vanguard character and drag that into Sequencer 我们只需要将我们的Vanguard角色拖放到Sequencer中 you can just click on any actor and then click on the Add Track button 你只需点击任何一个角色，然后点击添加轨道按钮 and just add this selected actor into Sequencer 然后将所选的角色添加到Sequencer中 So let's start adding some animations to our characters 所以让我们开始给我们的角色添加一些动画 Let's hide our good Vanguard warrior and his lightsaber 让我们隐藏我们优秀的先锋战士和他的光剑 and let's just focus in on our first warrior here 让我们只关注我们这里的第一个战士 So the most important concept to talk about is motion blending 所以最重要的概念是运动融合 So the main idea here when animating with these existing clips 所以在使用这些现有片段进行动画制作时的主要思想是 is to string multiple animations together back to back to back 将多个动画连续串联在一起 to create our animations through these clips instead of keyframes 通过这些片段来创建我们的动画，而不是关键帧 let's add in some attack animations 让我们添加一些攻击动画 So we have this attack three where he's sliding through 我们有这个滑行攻击动画 and then let's add in another attack animation right after 然后让我们在之后添加另一个攻击动画 So now we have these two attack animations 现在我们有了这两个攻击动画 but as soon as one clip ends and the next one starts 但是一段片段结束并开始下一段时 our Vanguard warrior ends up popping back to his original pivot point 我们的先锋战士会弹回到他的原始旋转点 So in order to link these animations together 所以为了将这些动画连接在一起 so the next one starts or the last one stops 以便下一个动画开始或最后一个动画停止 all you have to do is right-click on any of these animation clips 你只需要右键单击任何这些动画片段 and go to these motion blending options 然后进入这些运动融合选项 And we can either match the position of the previous animation clip 我们可以匹配前一个动画片段的位置 or the next animation clip if we had one to the right of our animation here 或者如果我们在这个动画的右边有下一个动画片段的话 And I'll actually add one on the right side 实际上我会在右侧添加一个 so we can show how that works later 这样我们之后可以展示它是如何工作的 So just to fix this first example here 所以为了修复这个第一个例子 all we have to do is let's click on our second attack animation here 我们所要做的就是点击这里的第二个攻击动画 and then right-click on it 然后右键单击它 And I want to match this bone with the previous clip 我想将这个骨骼与前一个片段匹配 So I'm taking the position of where we end up in the previous clip 所以我将取决于我们在前一个片段结束时的位置 And nine times out of ten 十有八九 you're going to want to match to the hip bone of the previous animation 你会想要将其匹配到前一个动画的髋骨上 I can't tell you why 我无法告诉你为什么 but usually the first time you do this in a scene 但通常在场景中第一次这样做时 it won't work 它不会起作用 Now that is not to alarm you 现在这并不是要吓唬你 this is part of the process 这是过程的一部分 although obviously this is super confusing for beginners 尽管显然对于初学者来说这非常令人困惑 But typically what I'll do is I'll match with this bone in the previous 但通常我会将其与前一个骨骼匹配 or the next clip and then I'll turn off matching 然后我会关闭匹配 So I'll reset that animation and then I'll go back and do the same exact thing 所以我会重置那个动画，然后回来做同样的事情 and just go to match with this bone in the previous clip 然后匹配到前一个片段的骨骼 and set that to hips 将其设置为髋部 And all of a sudden the second time it'll usually work 突然第二次它通常会起作用 So now we can see these two animations are transitioning into one another 现在我们可以看到这两个动画正在过渡 and by making these two animations overlap even more 通过让这两个动画更多地重叠 you can see that we have some curves that shows us that the animations 你可以看到我们有一些曲线来显示动画 are actually transitioning and usually by overlapping these two clips 实际上正在过渡，并且通常通过重叠这两个片段 you'll get a smoother transition between our two animations 你将获得两个动画之间更平滑的过渡 So that's the basic idea 所以这就是基本思想 but now let's create some choreography for our bad guy here 但现在让我们为我们的坏人创作一些编舞 So looking at the original animation 所以看看原始动画 all we need this guy to do is turn around 我们只需要这个家伙转过身来 attack once 攻击一次 and then trigger a death animation when a Vanguard warrior slices through his body 然后当先锋战士切割穿过他的身体时触发死亡动画 We add our first animation 我们添加第一个动画 Let's just add a slash animation 让我们添加一个斜杠动画 I'll just go on the animation track and pick this slash 我只需要在动画轨道上选择这个斜杠
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: So let's add a death animation 所以让我们添加一个死亡动画 So we'll add this death too 所以我们也会添加这个死亡动画 And this is a cool thing 这是一个很酷的事情 you can just overlap these and they will start to blend in between 你可以将它们重叠在一起，它们将开始混合在一起 They'll do like a soft blend 它们会像软混合一样 You can see we can have a seamless blend between our two animations on our guy right here 你可以看到我们可以在这个家伙身上的两个动画之间实现无缝混合 So just to fill out the beginning here 所以只是为了填补这里的开头 let's add in just a simple idle animation 让我们添加一个简单的待机动画 and just like that 就像这样 we already have the animation blocked out for our first character 我们已经为我们的第一个角色制作了动画 so we have our enemy Vanguard slicing through and have his death animation 所以我们有了我们的敌人先锋切割并有了他的死亡动画 So let's start adding some animations to our first Vanguard warrior 所以让我们开始为我们的第一个先锋战士添加一些动画 So just as a reminder 所以只是提醒一下 make sure you have snapping enabled before we added animations 在我们添加动画之前，请确保启用了捕捉 but I'd like to start off with this attack and slashing through the character here 但我想从这个攻击和切割角色开始 And then we can add in the running at the beginning 然后我们可以在开头添加奔跑动画 and his final stomp of the drones at the very end 以及他最后在无人机上的跺脚动作 So around here 所以在这里 let's go back and let's add in an animation track and let's type in attack 让我们回去，添加一个动画轨道，并输入攻击 And I'll start off with attack 2. 我会从攻击2开始 So now we have him coming in here 所以现在我们可以看到他进来了 The timing is obviously a little bit off 时间显然有点不对 but there we go to start 但这是我们的开始 And then let's add in attack 3. 然后让我们添加攻击3 So he transitions into a second attack 所以他过渡到了第二次攻击 So this second attack will have him slicing through the enemy here 所以这第二次攻击将使他切割敌人 So let's at least offset the timing 所以让我们至少调整一下时间 So they're a little bit closer 所以他们离得更近一些 we can see around this frame is when they need to line up 我们可以看到在这个帧周围他们需要对齐 and then let's line up this attack animation here 然后让我们将这个攻击动画对齐到这里 So if you have this transform track 所以如果你有这个变换轨道 and if you don't see this 如果你没有看到这个 just add another transform track under Vanguard green 只需在绿色先锋下添加另一个变换轨道 We already have one that exists here 我们已经有一个存在于这里 So what we're going to do is we're just going to drag these 所以我们要做的就是拖动它们 until we can align our characters 直到我们能够对齐角色 So let's get lined up at around frame 76. 所以让我们在第76帧左右对齐 And now from here 现在从这里开始 we can make sure that this slash goes through his body 我们可以确保这个斜线穿过他的身体 he slashes right through 他直接斩过去 And then one other thing we might have to do is we might have to rotate our character as well 然后我们可能还需要旋转角色 So that he slashes off to the side here instead of through this other character's body 这样他就会斜着砍到这边，而不是穿过另一个角色的身体 So that's actually really easy to do as well 这也非常容易做到 We'll just take our rotation keyframes and we'll rotate him a little bit more 我们只需要取出旋转关键帧，再多旋转一点角度 You can also just grab the transform gizmo here and align it on the fly 你也可以直接抓住变换控件，在飞行中进行对齐 So it should feel a little bit more creative when we're doing it that way 所以这样做的时候应该会感觉更有创意 And that's great 这很好 And we can rotate him a little bit more and just start finessing that into place 我们可以再旋转他一点，然后开始将其精确放置 now we have our slash aligned 现在我们的斜线已经对齐了 Now let's do the motion blending setup 现在让我们进行动作混合设置 so that we can align the clashing during this first attack here 这样我们就可以在这次第一次攻击中对齐冲突 So since we like the position of sword and shield attack 3 因此，我们喜欢剑盾攻击3的位置 we want to make sure we are updating the motion blending settings of our previous attack 我们要确保更新先前攻击的动作混合设置 And what I like to do a lot of times is I'll put the playhead over the animation that I want to keep 而我经常做的一件事是将播放头放在我想保留的动画上 I like this position 我喜欢这个位置 I want to keep this position 我想保持这个位置 So then I'll keep the playhead over that animation 然后我会将播放头保持在那个动画上 And then I'm going to right-click on our previous animation 然后我要右键点击我们之前的动画 And then we want to match with the bone 然后我们要与骨骼匹配 the hip bone 髋骨 in the following clip 在下一个片段中 So when we click that 所以当我们点击它时 nothing should happen 不应该发生任何事情 And when we scrub backwards 当我们向后拖动时 we should be able to see the animation starts where the last one stopped 我们应该能够看到动画从上一个停止的地方开始 Now all we have to do is we can start overlapping these a little bit more so they blend together 现在我们只需要开始将它们重叠一些，使它们混合在一起 So now the motion blending is correct 所以现在动作混合是正确的 but we can obviously see that their swords aren't colliding 但是我们显然可以看到他们的剑没有碰撞 But it's pretty easy to start aligning these a little bit closer 但是开始将它们对齐得更近是相当容易的 So let's see what's going on exactly here 所以让我们看看这里到底发生了什么 So our first attack is going in early and the second attack happens too late 所以我们的第一次攻击太早了，第二次攻击发生得太晚 So one thing we could do is we could slow down this first animation 所以我们可以做的一件事是减慢这个第一个动画的速度 So if I right-click on the sword and shield attack here and go into the properties panel 所以如果我在这里右键点击剑盾攻击，并进入属性面板 you can scroll all the way down until you see this play rate 你可以一直滚动到底，直到看到这个播放速率 And this is the playback speed of this individual animation clip 这是这个单独动画片段的播放速度 So if I set this to 05 所以如果我将其设置为0.5 it'll go half as fast 它将变慢一半 If I set this to 2 如果我将其设置为2 it'll go twice as fast 它将加快两倍 So I'm going to set this to somewhere in the middle 所以我要将其设置为中间的某个值 I'm going to set it to 07 我要将其设置为0.7 instead of 0.5. 而不是0.5 So it's still a lot slower 所以它还是慢了很多 So you can use that method to retime any of these animation clips 所以你可以使用这种方法来重新计时任何这些动画片段 But oftentimes it just takes a little bit of sliding these animations back and forth 但通常只需要稍微来回滑动这些动画 to massage in the right timing between two characters 在两个角色之间调整正确的时间 So in this case 所以在这种情况下 the green Vanguard is slashing too early 绿色先锋太早斩击 and the red Vanguard is slashing too late 红色先锋太晚斩击 So if we took this first animation and just pushed it to happen later 所以如果我们将这个第一个动画推迟一点 to match the timing of our red Vanguard here 以与我们的红色先锋的时间相匹配 we can see that we'll start to align the clashes 我们可以看到我们开始对齐冲突 so they happen at about the same time 所以它们几乎同时发生 And because we're smoothly transitioning between these two animations 而且因为我们在这两个动画之间平滑过渡 the green Vanguard actually has a really smooth animation 绿色先锋实际上有一个非常平滑的动画 as he slices through the character here 当他在这里切割角色时 So let's take a look at where our camera is going to be aiming 所以让我们看看我们的摄像机将瞄准的位置 We'll have it a bit closer to the ground 我们将它稍微靠近地面一点 And honestly 老实说 I think that's close enough 我觉得已经足够近了 where we can at least start proceeding with the rest of our animation 我们至少可以开始进行剩下的动画 as we're massaging everything in to make our final shot 当我们将所有东西调整到最终镜头时 so now let's add in the run animation for the first half of our shot 所以现在让我们在镜头的前半部分添加奔跑动画 But as you can see 但正如你所看到的 the animations that came with this pack 这个包中附带的动画 have our running animation traveling throughout the world 我们的奔跑动画在整个世界中移动 Because this loops and starts at one place and ends in another 因为这个循环从一个地方开始，结束在另一个地方 it makes it very difficult to string these animations together 这使得将这些动画串联在一起非常困难 So one thing that we can do in the animation editor is enable root motion 所以我们在动画编辑器中可以做的一件事就是启用根运动 we'll lock our entire animation to the hips 我们将整个动画锁定在臀部 and then we'll want to change this from reference pose to animation first frame 然后我们要将其从参考姿势改为动画的第一帧 and that'll kind of fix the angle that he's at 这样会修复他的角度 We'll just make sure this force root lock is checked as true 我们只需要确保这个强制根锁定被选中为true So we'll save that 所以我们会保存这个 Now we have run in place that we can add into our scene 现在我们有了奔跑动画，可以添加到我们的场景中 So I'm just going to go into our animation dropdown and add in place 所以我只需要进入我们的动画下拉菜单，添加到原地 and we'll see our run animation here 然后我们会看到我们的奔跑动画 And now when we drag it into our scene 现在当我们将其拖入场景时 we can see that everything's set up as intended 我们可以看到一切都按照预期设置好了 And what's cool about this is now when we extend this out 而且很酷的是，当我们扩展它时 and drag it beyond the bounds of the original animation 并将其拖出原始动画的范围 it'll loop correctly and work as we would expect 它将正确循环并按我们的预期工作 So now with our corrected run animation 所以现在我们有了修正后的奔跑动画 we'll align it to the end of our attack to clip 我们将其与攻击剪辑的末尾对齐 and then we'll do the same process we did before 然后我们将执行与之前相同的过程 So let's hover our time indicator over this run in place animation 让我们将时间指示器悬停在原地奔跑动画上 We'll right click on here and match with this bone in the next clip 我们将在此处右键单击，并与下一个剪辑中的骨骼匹配 and select hips 选择髋部 this doesn't always work 这并不总是有效的 It's just part of the process 这只是过程的一部分 So in cases like this when the animations just aren't aligning 所以在这种情况下，当动画无法对齐时 even after you've tried aligning this with the next clip 即使在尝试与下一个剪辑对齐之后 one thing we can do is we can just set up some transform keyframes 我们可以设置一些变换关键帧 to make sure that our animation aligns properly 确保我们的动画正确对齐 So what we can do is let's just close our transformation track here 所以我们可以做的是让我们关闭这里的变换轨道 and let's create an additive transformation track 然后我们创建一个附加的变换轨道 So essentially now we have two transformation tracks 所以现在我们有了两个变换轨道 that we can add keyframes to which is really nice 我们可以添加关键帧，这非常好 So we can have this as a separate layer just for this one animation 所以我们可以将其作为一个单独的图层，只用于这个动画 And what we're going to do is set a keyframe 我们要做的是设置一个关键帧 on the first frame of this sword and shield attack here 在这个剑盾攻击的第一帧上 So I'll set a location and rotation keyframe 所以我将设置位置和旋转关键帧 Then we can hover over these right click and set these to constant 然后我们可以悬停在这些上面，右键单击并将其设置为常数 and
